attackFindings.summary: 检测到链上时间操控攻击：oracle-twap-manipulation (4 updates + borrow/liquidate)，0 次时间敏感函数调用在同一 PTB

remediation.threat: Attacker is abusing on-chain Clock timestamps to bypass time-locks, drain vesting schedules, or manipulate TWAP oracle windows — all calls in a single PTB observe the same timestamp, defeating per-interval guards.
immediateActions: PAUSE: Halt all time-sensitive operations (vest, unlock, redeem) immediately.
AUDIT: Verify time-lock state is stored per-user and updated on each call, not just compared to Clock.
REVIEW: Check if TWAP/oracle windows are being collapsed by rapid same-block updates.
PATCH: Use epoch + stored timestamp to enforce minimum intervals; do not rely solely on clock comparison.
ESCALATE: Check pending transactions from the same sender for follow-up extraction.

ESCALATE: If funds appear to be moving unexpectedly, treat as active exploit.
PRESERVE: Screenshot and archive all relevant TX details before on-chain state changes.
RESEARCH: Check Sui security channels (Immunefi, Twitter/X) for reports of similar activity.

readiness.summary: Needs a final pass before submission (77/100). Address required warnings and capture live chain evidence.

checks.label: Track fit
checks.evidence: Sui Guardian is positioned for DeFi & Payments, with AI-generated monitoring rules as an Agentic Web extension.
checks.action: Keep the submission focused on DeFi protocol loss prevention and incident response.

checks.label: Real project configuration
checks.action: Add at least one real Sui protocol package, protected address, and admin sender to the active config.

checks.label: Core detection coverage
checks.evidence: 1 package(s), 0 protected address(es), 4 function guard(s), 11 behavior/object rule(s).
checks.action: Cover package upgrades, treasury/vault outflows, privileged functions, and burst/failure/object anomalies.

checks.label: Mainnet deployment path
checks.evidence: Current network is testnet; endpoint is https://graphql.testnet.sui.io/graphql.
checks.action: Run the final demo against Sui mainnet, or clearly mark testnet-only evidence in the submission.

checks.label: Live chain evidence
checks.evidence: Last successful scan processed checkpoint 337110091 with 424 transaction(s).
checks.action: Run a successful scan before recording the submission demo.

checks.label: Incident response loop
checks.evidence: Dashboard and API support incident aggregation, open/acknowledged/resolved states, scan history, and remediation notes.
checks.action: In the demo, show one alert being acknowledged or resolved to prove the operator workflow.

checks.label: Notification channel
checks.action: Configure Slack, Discord, or a generic incident webhook for the live demo.

checks.label: AI rule generation
checks.evidence: AI rule generation exists, but hot reload is disabled in the active config.
checks.action: Use the AI analysis panel or generated rules flow in the demo if pitching the Agentic Web angle.

checks.label: Known exploit hardening
checks.evidence: No deprecated package addresses are configured.
checks.action: Add deprecated package addresses for protocols with retired vulnerable versions.

criticalGaps: Cover package upgrades, treasury/vault outflows, privileged functions, and burst/failure/object anomalies.
Run the final demo against Sui mainnet, or clearly mark testnet-only evidence in the submission.
